title: Delivery, security, and v0.1 acceptance matrix
description: Finalize CDN/npm/local delivery docs and examples, security review for untrusted DSL/SVG output, acceptance matrix across product/model/syntax/views/engine specs, and release-ready examples.
triage_notes: Cut from 00/04 delivery modes, security, and minimal acceptance criteria. Completion: docs/examples demonstrate CDN/npm/local/custom-element usage; labels are escaped/sanitized; acceptance matrix maps every v0.1 criterion to pass/defer evidence. 2026-06-28 Codex checkpoint: added docs/DELIVERY.md with npm/local/static/CDN patterns and security posture; added docs/V0_1_ACCEPTANCE_MATRIX.md mapping product, view, engine, and security criteria to Pass/Partial/Defer evidence; README and docs/SYNTAX.md now link/update current delivery, zone-as-add-info, routing validation, 3D, and remaining constraints. package.json files now include dist plus public docs/specs/examples while excluding internal docs/aof. Verification: npm run build, git diff --check, npm pack --dry-run (49 files; public docs/examples included; docs/aof excluded). 2026-06-28 Codex license checkpoint: human chose Apache-2.0; added LICENSE, package.json license metadata, THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md, and README/DELIVERY license + trademark notes. npm pack --dry-run confirmed LICENSE and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md are included. 2026-06-28 Codex export checkpoint: added RenderResult.exportPng()/downloadPng(), custom-element/local/demo PNG toolbar buttons, 2D SVG-to-PNG export, and 3D canvas PNG export with preserveDrawingBuffer; docs/spec API updated; typecheck/render+3D tests/build pass; dev server restarted on 127.0.0.1:4174. 2026-06-28 Codex release-prep checkpoint: expanded SYNTAX quick start/concepts/viewer/CDN/PNG docs; unscoped archmap is occupied on npm, so package renamed to @archmap/core with docs/import maps/self-references updated; added GitHub Pages workflow for the built viewer page; npm access confirms @archmap scope read-write and @archmap/core unpublished; pack dry-run confirms publishable tarball. 2026-06-28 Codex Pages CI checkpoint: created sanitized public repo ai-org-labs/archmap without .aof/docs/aof; first Pages workflow failed because CI lacked node:fs/node:url typings; added explicit @types/node and verified typecheck/build; Pages needed one-time gh API enablement because GITHUB_TOKEN could not create the site. 2026-06-28 Codex publication checkpoint: GitHub Pages deployed successfully, @archmap/core@0.1.0 was published, npm pack downloaded the published tarball, jsDelivr 404 cache was purged, and CDN URLs returned HTTP 200. Remaining: consider v0.1.0 tag/release notes, decide final wording for spec-level zone base view vs product UI zone overlay, add a browser download smoke test when browser automation is available, and keep dense-rendering QIF audits active before final release readiness.
